data.title: WHY MEMORY DOESN'T EXIST.
blocks: The five-element format rests on one fact about Claude that, once understood, reorganizes everything else.
Why Memory Doesn't Exist — Claude has no memory between prompts. Every prompt is read fresh. The conversation scrolling up your screen is, mechanic

data.title: CONVENTIONS
blocks: · Python 3.11+, standard library only unless a dependency is justified in the SDD.
· snake_case for functions and variables; dataclasses for record types.
· Dates are ISO-8601 strings; empty CSV cells parse to None, never "".
